title: Malty German-Style Chinese Pancakes
description: A twist on traditional Chinese pancakes by incorporating malty german bread for a denser texture and crispy bacon for added smokiness. These sweet pancakes are perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine cubed malty german bread, crumbled bacon, and baking powder. Set aside.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, sugar, and salt until well combined.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a sticky dough forms.
Gradually add in water and continue to mix until the dough is smooth.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the dough onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm with your favorite toppings, such as honey, fruit, or syrup.
